item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed asleep/direct: it recognized the user was already asking to stop scattered page-level patches and redesign the upstream after-sales rules entry. It gave a concrete unified rules-center plan, entry placement, structure, and rollout sequence without firing a triage/method framework or stopping the user for meta-analysis."}
